categories: Signing, key management, and HSM path
Optional blockchain anchoring / wallet / payment integrations

p0Workstreams.title: Production auth model
p0Workstreams.rationale: Authentication is admin-token or operator-token only; production deployment requires a hardened auth architecture.
p0Workstreams.acceptanceGate: A documented auth decision record and a local proof-of-concept implementation plan.

p0Workstreams.title: Secret management
p0Workstreams.rationale: The repository uses a demo Ed25519 keypair and synthetic data; production requires managed secrets, rotation, and access control.
p0Workstreams.acceptanceGate: A secret-management plan with no synthetic keys in the repository.

p0Workstreams.title: Deployment environment definition
p0Workstreams.rationale: No containers, load balancing, TLS termination, or orchestration guidance exists; production requires a defined runtime target.
p0Workstreams.acceptanceGate: Environment definition document and a reproducible local deployment target.

p0Workstreams.title: Database production readiness / PostgreSQL CI
p0Workstreams.rationale: SQLite is the default; PostgreSQL support exists but is not CI-gated, creating production database risk.
p0Workstreams.acceptanceGate: PostgreSQL passes in CI alongside SQLite; migration rollback tested.

p0Workstreams.title: Backup and restore plan
p0Workstreams.rationale: No automated backup, point-in-time recovery, or disaster runbooks exist; production requires recoverability.
p0Workstreams.acceptanceGate: Documented backup/restore procedure with a tested recovery scenario.

p0Workstreams.title: Observability baseline
p0Workstreams.rationale: No metrics, logging pipelines, alerting, or tracing exist; production requires operational visibility.
p0Workstreams.acceptanceGate: A local observability stack that captures the baseline signals.

p0Workstreams.title: CI gate definition
p0Workstreams.rationale: The minimum CI pipeline is not formally defined; production readiness requires automated quality gates.
p0Workstreams.acceptanceGate: All P0 CI stages pass before any merge to main.

p0Workstreams.title: API and OpenAPI contract hardening
p0Workstreams.rationale: The current contract is verified for expected and legacy paths, but a freeze process and external review may reveal gaps.
p0Workstreams.acceptanceGate: A documented contract freeze process and a versioned OpenAPI artifact.

p0Workstreams.title: Data privacy and evidence-handling boundaries
p0Workstreams.rationale: What data may enter GrantLayer, what must stay in the partner perimeter, and how evidence retention maps to regulatory requirements are undefined.
p0Workstreams.acceptanceGate: A data-classification matrix and evidence retention policy draft.

p1Workstreams.title: Local API smoke v2 or planned-call validation
p1Workstreams.rationale: Extending the GL-061 demo runner improves partner confidence and catches integration edge cases before production hardening.
p1Workstreams.acceptanceGate: The smoke script validates additional paths and produces a machine-readable confidence report.

p1Workstreams.title: SDK / client examples
p1Workstreams.rationale: No client libraries exist; minimal examples accelerate partner integration and surface API usability issues.
p1Workstreams.acceptanceGate: Client examples exist, are tested, and map to the OpenAPI contract.

p1Workstreams.title: External integration checklist
p1Workstreams.rationale: Partners need a clear map of where their systems connect to GrantLayer.
p1Workstreams.acceptanceGate: A partner-facing integration checklist with touchpoint definitions.

p1Workstreams.title: Pilot-specific environment documentation
p1Workstreams.rationale: Partners need clear instructions to run GrantLayer locally or in a hosted demo instance.
p1Workstreams.acceptanceGate: Partner environment setup guide with verified commands.

p1Workstreams.title: Operator/admin runbook
p1Workstreams.rationale: Common operations must be documented before any partner runs the system.
p1Workstreams.acceptanceGate: A runbook covering the most frequent operator tasks.

p1Workstreams.title: Audit/export review workflow
p1Workstreams.rationale: Auditors and compliance officers need guidance on how to review exported records.
p1Workstreams.acceptanceGate: Auditor review workflow with example output and interpretation guide.

p1Workstreams.title: Evidence retention policy draft
p1Workstreams.rationale: Evidence lifespan, immutable storage guarantees, and deletion constraints need a written policy.
p1Workstreams.acceptanceGate: A policy document reviewed by at least one stakeholder.

p2Workstreams.title: Dashboard / UI readiness
p2Workstreams.rationale: The HTML dashboard is present but not a productized UI; full productization is post-pilot work.
p2Workstreams.acceptanceGate: UI supports all Product Core stages and passes basic accessibility checks.

p2Workstreams.title: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture
p2Workstreams.rationale: No tenant isolation, subscription billing, or SaaS onboarding exists; this is a major architectural expansion.
p2Workstreams.acceptanceGate: Architecture decision record and a local multi-tenant proof of concept.

p2Workstreams.title: Signing, key management, and HSM path
p2Workstreams.rationale: Software Ed25519 signing is acceptable for pilots; HSM-backed key management is a future upgrade.
p2Workstreams.acceptanceGate: HSM integration plan with vendor-agnostic interface definition.

p2Workstreams.title: Optional blockchain anchoring / wallet / payment integrations
p2Workstreams.rationale: Integrity checks use standard SHA-256 and Ed25519 only; blockchain anchoring and payment are optional future integrations, not Product Core requirements.
p2Workstreams.acceptanceGate: Integration design document with security and compliance review.

p2Workstreams.title: Advanced observability
p2Workstreams.rationale: Distributed tracing, custom business metrics, and SLO dashboards are post-pilot enhancements.
p2Workstreams.acceptanceGate: Tracing covers end-to-end grant flow; SLOs are defined and measured.

p2Workstreams.title: Compliance/legal review boundary
p2Workstreams.rationale: Formal compliance review support requires architecture diagrams, data-flow maps, and control matrices.
p2Workstreams.acceptanceGate: Compliance package with architecture diagrams, data-flow maps, and control matrices.
